hero.titleLine2: Platform for Sharing Ideas, Engaging in Discussion
hero.description: DailyWrite is an open blogging platform where users share insights on technology, daily life, and general topics while engaging in thoughtful discussion and meaningful interaction.

encourage.description: Discover thoughtful articles on technology, daily life, and general topics shared by a growing community of writers.

faq.description: Find answers to common questions about DailyWrite, including what types of content you can post, enrollment, and more.
faq.q2: How can we post the blogs?
faq.q3: Is it free to create an account?
faq.q4: What topics can I write about?
faq.q5: How do I create an account?
faq.a1: DailyWrite is a community blogging platform where people can share ideas, experiences, and insights across different topics.
faq.a2: Create an account, click the Write button, add your title and content, then publish your blog post.
faq.a3: Yes. Creating an account and publishing on DailyWrite is free.
faq.a4: You can write about technology, daily life, education, personal growth, and other helpful general topics.
faq.a5: Click Register, fill in your basic information, then submit the form to create your account.

feedback.title: Share Your Feedback
feedback.description: Your voice matters! Tell us how we can improve and make this platform better for writers and readers. Together, we can grow a more engaging and supportive blogging community.

footer.organizationName: Institute of Science and Technology Advanced Development
footer.slogan: Providing a platform for sharing ideas and knowledge with everyone.

blogList.description: This space is dedicated to my daily writing — a collection of reflections, experiences, and quiet thoughts that might otherwise be forgotten. Writing every day keeps me grounded, mindful, and inspired.

about.heroDescription: At DailyWrite, we believe that ideas have the power to inspire change and spark meaningful conversations. Our platform is built to provide an open space where writers can share insights, readers can explore diverse perspectives, and communities can grow through thoughtful discussion. Whether you're passionate about technology, daily life, or general topics, DailyWrite empowers every voice to be heard.

mission.intro: To become the most trusted source for insightful content and authentic storytelling, delivering valuable knowledge, diverse perspectives, and engaging narratives that inform, inspire, and connect readers from all walks of life.
mission.qualityDesc: We publish well-researched, thoughtfully crafted articles that provide real value to our readers.
mission.communityDesc: We foster meaningful discussions and welcome diverse perspectives from our engaged community.
mission.freshDesc: We bring you unique insights and fresh ideas that challenge conventional thinking.
mission.regularDesc: New articles every week to keep you informed, inspired, and coming back for more.
mission.diverseDesc: We feature guest writers and experts from various fields to bring you multifaceted viewpoints.
mission.trustedDesc: We verify our sources and fact-check all content to maintain the highest standards of accuracy.

team.description1: We are a team of passionate students from ISTAD, dedicated to building an innovative blogging platform that makes sharing ideas accessible to everyone. As part of our project, we designed DailyWrite to provide a space where individuals can express their thoughts, explore diverse perspectives, and engage in meaningful discussions.
team.description2: Join us on this journey to share knowledge, spark conversations, and grow together as a community.

contact.chatText: Have a question? Chat with us live — we're here to help!
contact.callText: Got a question? Call us — we're here to help!
contact.addressText: Visit us at our office — we'd love to meet you!
contact.availableText: We're available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.description: Looking to make a deal or start a collaboration? We're excited to hear from you! Get in touch with us today, and let's discuss how we can work together to achieve great things.

auth.registerSubtitle: Write what in you mind with DailyWrite
